titleStmt.title: SII 41.140: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 140. (A.R. No. 139 of 1905.) Karuvūr, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the Moṭṭai-gōpuram of the Pasupatīśvara temple at Karuvūr, left of entrance.

summary.p: The Śivabrāhmaṇas of the Tiruvānilai-uḍaiya-nāyanār temple at Karuvūr in Veṅgāla-nāḍu in Vīrachōḻa-maṇḍalam received an amount of 10 Śriyakki-paḻañchalākai achchu from the Puravuvari officer Āḷavandār Avināsi for food offerings in the temple. It is said that the offerings had been disrupted so far due to some calamity (kalaham).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecari paṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkirama coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 ṟāvatu viracoḻamaṇṭalattu veṅkalanāṭṭu karuvūṟ tiruvāṉilaiyāḷuṭaiya nā Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom perumāḷ puravariyāril Āḷavantāṉ Aviṉāci m nācci koyil kuṭaṅ�
kalakattil cemantappiṉamaiyil Ivarai Ārāyntu Eḻuntaruḷivittu koṇṭuvara tāṉattār kuṭutta paṇam nūṟum Inṉāyaṉār paṇṭārattil kuṭutta putukkācāl paṇam Eṇpatum Āka paṇam nūṟṟeṇpatum Ivar pakkale kaikkoṇṭu Ikkūttaṟku kuṟaivuḷḷavai Ivarai Iṭuvitte ceyvittu sampurakṣa mutupaṭi ṭuḷākarici I
nāḻiyum cantirādhittavarai celuttuvatāka Ivar pakkal nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa ciriyakki paḻañcalākai Accu pattum kaikkoṇṭu Ivvamutupaṭi Arici Irunāḻiyum Ikkōyilil kuṭam koṇṭu koyil pukuvar cantirādhittavarai celuttuvomākak kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Ikkoyiluṭaiya civa(m)pirāmaṇare legai m Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai

vīracoḻa maṇṭalattu veṅkāla nāṭ
la kaṇakkaṉum Ivvaṉaivōm Ākama maṭa
karum Ikkōyil c kūttāṭuvāṟkum nācci

Iva(r)kaḷ pakkal
nāḻiyum muṭṭāmal celuttu
Iṭṭu varuvatākavum Ippaṭi canti
ṉar celuttilomākil Ik
koṇṭu koyil pukuvār canti
vāḷākavum Ippaṭikku kalveṭ
ra rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 41.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
